description: Aggregates the justhodl-llm-cost DDB ledger into data/llm-cost.json for the LLM Cost Desk. Per-day (14d) + per-engine/model (today) calls/cache-hit-rate/tokens/USD, today's spend vs SSM budget, governance mode, estimated cache savings.

schedule.description: Hourly at :05 — refresh LLM cost ledger aggregation
